old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d","title":"PHY: LR-FHSS mode for SX1262 devices","description":"## Problem

Standard LoRa uses single-frequency transmission. At density, collisions destroy entire packets. LR-FHSS spreads each packet across 35-280 frequency hops, so collisions corrupt fragments, not whole packets.

## Hardware requirement

**SX1262/SX1261 only.** Older SX1276/78 devices cannot support LR-FHSS.

Supported devices: RAK4631, T-Echo, Heltec V3, T-Beam Supreme, R1 Neo
Not supported: T-Beam v1, Heltec V2, older ESP32 boards

## Solution

Add LR-FHSS as optional PHY mode:
1. Gateway advertises LR-FHSS capability in DIO
2. SX1262 nodes can opt into LR-FHSS mode
3. SX1276 nodes continue standard LoRa (backward compatible)
4. Gateway receives both modes (dual-mode RX)

## Tradeoffs

- ~2x airtime penalty per packet
- But: massive collision resilience (10x+ improvement at density)
- Excludes ~50% of existing hardware

## Acceptance criteria

- Spec defines LR-FHSS mode advertisement and negotiation
- Zephyr driver supports LR-FHSS on SX1262
- Gateway can receive both standard LoRa and LR-FHSS
- Scale test shows collision resilience improvement","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:19:46.120605Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:19:46.120605Z","labels":["phy","scalability","hardware"]}

## Acceptance criteria

- Spec defines LR-FHSS mode advertisement and negotiation
- Zephyr driver supports LR-FHSS on SX1262
- Gateway can receive both standard LoRa and LR-FHSS
- Scale test shows collision resilience improvement","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:19:46.120605Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T22:14:47.278050478Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T22:14:47.278050478Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T22:19:47.278050478Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T22:14:47.278050478Z","labels":["phy","scalability","hardware"]}

new_value: Spec for LR-FHSS (zd2d.1) implemented in spec/02-physical-link.md:3.6; driver (zd2d.2) and simulator (zd2d.3) remain open as next issues; commit 5c55fc68b; .gitignore updated for build dirs
